 {"id":"gt-2kz","title":"CLI: cleanup commands for stale state","description":"Cleanup commands for recovering from stale state.

## Commands

### gt cleanup <polecat>
Clean stale state for specific polecat.
```
gt cleanup <rig>/<polecat> [--dry-run]
```

Actions:
- Remove orphaned state.json if clone missing
- Clear stale session references
- Reset stuck state (working → idle after timeout)

### gt cleanup --all
Clean all polecats in workspace.
```
gt cleanup --all [--dry-run]
```

## Implementation
```go
func CleanupPolecat(rigName, polecatName string, dryRun bool) (*CleanupResult, error)

type CleanupResult struct {
    OrphanedStateRemoved bool
    SessionsCleared      int
    StateReset           bool
    Warnings             []string
}
```

## Overlap with Doctor
- Doctor diagnoses and offers --fix
- Cleanup is more aggressive state recovery
- Consider merging into doctor --fix

## New File
internal/cmd/cleanup.go

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Removes orphaned state files
- [ ] Clears stale session refs
- [ ] --dry-run shows what would happen
- [ ] Reports all actions taken","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-16T14:48:31.944982-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-16T16:07:12.430696-08:00"}

Run 'bd show gt-o9j' for details.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-20T07:52:51.623541-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-20T07:56:41.861992-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-20T07:56:41.861992-08:00"}
 {"id":"gt-mh5s","title":"Refinery gates: test/lint/build before merge","description":"Before merging polecat work to main, run configurable quality gates.

**From VC**: internal/gates/ - parallel execution with timeout, any failure = overall failure.

**Gas Town implementation**: Refinery config with gate commands:
```yaml
gates:
  test:
    cmd: go test ./...
    timeout: 5m
  lint:
    cmd: golangci-lint run
    timeout: 2m
  build:
    cmd: go build ./...
    timeout: 3m
parallel: true
```

If gates fail, don't merge. Polecat can iterate and retry.

**Value**: Prevents broken code from reaching main. VC had 90.9% gate pass rate.

**VC complexity**: ~200 lines Go
**Gas Town complexity**: ~10 lines YAML","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-20T20:30:12.44681-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-20T20:30:12.44681-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-mh5s","depends_on_id":"gt-zhpa","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-20T20:30:27.402708-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
